programs.title: Bamay
programs.desc: Slow TV is back on NITV with more beautiful Bamay. Bamay III celebrates great Australian islands and saltwater country. Sit back and relax with the healing powers of country.

programs.title: Toi Time
programs.desc: Jojo makes a Taraka Hangarua and Buzz visits a Transfer Station to see where the recycling goes. Tama, Maia and Jojo recycle their Cans, Bottles, Jars and Lids.

programs.title: Waabiny Time
programs.desc: Djinang, Look! It's a yongka, a kangaroo. And can you see the wetj, the emu full of feathers.

programs.title: Birds Eye View
programs.desc: There's a new Tui in the hood. The birds decide to investigate before noticing the Humans getting into a territory fight of their own.

programs.title: Aussie Bush Tales
programs.desc: The midday sun was hot with feral animals walking across the desert looking for water.
